title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's hiring platform Paraform diverges from the AI automation trend by pairing humans with AI to improve recruitment outcomes, having paid recruiters over $50 million while achieving 10x revenue growth. The company challenges conventional AI startup wisdom by emphasizing human judgment as a moat in hiring, citing increased noise in the hiring market as AI adoption rises.
